fullText: JUST IN: Artemis II has now reached its maximum distance from Earth and is beginning its journey home.

fullText:

name: Polymarket
fullText: JUST IN: Artemis II is now behind the moon, projected to lose communications with Earth for ~40 minutes.

name: Polymarket
fullText: BREAKING: The Artemis II toilet has broken (again), leaving the astronauts with no option but to use "diaper like" contraptions to relieve themselves.

name: Polymarket
fullText: JUST IN: Artemis II crew reports seeing strange "squiggles" & unexpected shades of green & brown during lunar flyby.
